vocab.meaning: vùng hoang dã nguyên sơ (chưa bị con người tác động)
vocab.example: The most striking thing about the Patagonian landscape is the vast stretches of unspoilt wilderness.
Driving along the Amalfi Coast, I was mesmerized by the shimmering coastline under the midday sun.

vocab.meaning: những ngọn núi đỉnh phủ tuyết
vocab.example: The horizon was dominated by a range of snow-capped mountains that looked like a scene from a postcard.

vocab.meaning: đổ xuống như thác (dùng cho nước hoặc sườn đồi)
vocab.example: I saw hundreds of small streams cascade down the lush green cliffs after the monsoon rain.
Camping in the Sahara provided me with a view of a starlit canopy so clear it felt surreal.

vocab.meaning: các mỏm đá vôi lởm chởm
vocab.example: The jagged limestone karsts rising out of the emerald water in Ha Long Bay are truly a sight to behold.

vocab.meaning: những con phố lát đá cuội
vocab.example: The charm of the old town lies in its narrow cobbled streets and centuries-old dwellings.

vocab.meaning: điểm quan sát có tầm nhìn ngoạn mục
vocab.example: We hiked for three hours to reach a breathtaking vantage point overlooking the entire valley.
The countryside was a sea of golden wheat and rolling hills stretching as far as the eye could see.
The Great Wall is not just a historical site; it is a man-made marvel integrated perfectly into the mountain ridges.
